scripts.predev: node scripts/ensure-app-sdk.mjs && node scripts/ensure-runtime-client.mjs && node scripts/validate-dev-env.mjs && kill-port 5173 && npm run rebuild:native && node scripts/ensure-runtime-bundle.mjs && node scripts/patch-electron-plist.mjs
scripts.dev:cp:local:verbose: cross-env HOLABOSS_INTERNAL_DEV=1 HOLABOSS_VERBOSE_TELEMETRY=1 npm run dev
scripts.dev:cp:dev:verbose: cross-env HOLABOSS_INTERNAL_DEV=1 HOLABOSS_VERBOSE_TELEMETRY=1 npm run dev
scripts.dev:electron:run: wait-on tcp:5173 file:out/dist-electron/main.cjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electronmon out/dist-electron/main.cjs
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.e2e: npm run rebuild:native && npm run build && node --test e2e/*.test.mjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run prepare:runtime:local:macos && npm run prepare:packaged-config && npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac dir --arm64 --config.mac.identity=-
scripts.dist:mac:local: npm run prepare:runtime:local:macos && npm run prepare:packaged-config && npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac dir --arm64 --config.mac.identity=-
scripts.dist:mac:dmg: npm run prepare:runtime:local:macos && npm run prepare:packaged-config && npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac dmg zip --arm64 --config.mac.identity=-
scripts.dist:mac:dmg:local: npm run prepare:runtime:local:macos && npm run prepare:packaged-config && npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac dmg zip --arm64 --config.mac.identity=-
scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare:runtime:local:windows && npm run prepare:packaged-config && npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:win:local: npm run prepare:runtime:local:windows && npm run prepare:packaged-config && npm run build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.packaged:run:local:verbose: cross-env HOLABOSS_INTERNAL_DEV=1 HOLABOSS_VERBOSE_TELEMETRY=1 HOLABOSS_DESKTOP_USER_DATA_DIR=holaboss-local-packaged npm run packaged:run
scripts.packaged:run:dev:verbose: cross-env HOLABOSS_INTERNAL_DEV=1 HOLABOSS_VERBOSE_TELEMETRY=1 HOLABOSS_DESKTOP_USER_DATA_DIR=holaboss-local-packaged npm run packaged:run
